# FormaNova
> AI-powered jewelry photography and CAD generation platform

## Products

### AI Jewelry Photoshoot
Upload a product image of your jewelry (ring, necklace, earring, bracelet, or watch) and receive professional model photoshoot renders. The AI preserves your product pixel-perfectly while placing it on realistic models and mannequins.

- Supported categories: necklace, earring, ring, bracelet, watch
- Studio URL: https://formanova.ai/studio

### Text-to-CAD
Describe jewelry in natural language and receive a 3D CAD model. Design rings, necklaces, earrings, and more from text prompts.

- Studio URL: https://formanova.ai/text-to-cad

### CAD Studio
Upload and render 3D jewelry CAD files with professional materials and lighting.

- Studio URL: https://formanova.ai/studio-cad

## Intended Users
Jewelry designers, retailers, manufacturers, CAD artists, e-commerce brands

## Pricing
Credit-based pricing. Plans start at $9 for 100 credits (~10 photos).

- Basic: $9 — 100 credits
- Standard: $39 — 500 credits
- Pro: $99 — 1,500 credits

Pricing page: https://formanova.ai/pricing

## Key URLs
- Homepage: https://formanova.ai
- AI Photoshoot info: https://formanova.ai/ai-jewelry-photoshoot
- AI CAD info: https://formanova.ai/ai-jewelry-cad
- Pricing: https://formanova.ai/pricing
- Login: https://formanova.ai/login
- Dashboard: https://formanova.ai/dashboard
